description_long: This house features a striking black-and-white half-timbered exterior, reminiscent of Tudor-style architecture, with bold vertical and horizontal black beams set against white infill panels. The roof is steeply pitched and covered in reddish-brown shingles, extending well beyond the walls to provide ample overhang. The front facade is symmetrical, with three multi-pane windows and a central wooden door accessed by a short set of stone steps. The side walls are dominated by vertical black beams and lack windows, while the rear wall has a single window centered within a grid of black framing. The base of the house is clad in dark stone, grounding the structure visually and providing a sense of solidity. The overall appearance is both traditional and visually distinctive, making it a prominent feature in any urban neighborhood.
description: A black-and-white half-timbered house with a steep reddish-brown shingled roof, symmetrical windows, and a central wooden door accessed by stone steps. The structure features bold black beams, white infill, and a solid stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central wooden door, three multi-pane windows, and stone steps leading to the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by vertical black beams and white infill, with no windows and the stone steps visible at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a single centered window within a grid of black framing and a solid stone base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with vertical black beams, white infill, and stone steps at the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, single centered window on rear, no windows on sides
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with stone steps, no porch or overhang, flanked by symmetrical windows
